gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/524)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/524)
text: قَالَ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) مَا ضَرَبَ رَجُلٌ الْقُرْآنَ بَعْضَهُ بِبَعْضٍ إِلَّا كَفَرَ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Al Qasim Bin Suleyman,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No man would strike the Quran, part of it with the other (explain one Verse with the other), except that he would disbelieve’.
en.sarwar: 25. Ali has narrated from his father from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from al-Qasim ibn Sulayman from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “My father has said, ‘Whoever mixes one part of the Holy Quran with the other part he turns into an unbeliever.’”
